original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Sofia, Victoria, Daniel, and Isabella. "If Daniel is a knight then Isabella is a knight" - Sofia. Victoria said, "Sofia is a knight." Daniel noted, "Victoria is a knight and Daniel is a knight". Isabella was heard saying, "Victoria is a knave if and only if Daniel is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?

similar_questions.question: On a peculiar island, only knights and knaves reside. Knights always tell the truth, while knaves always lie. You encounter 3 inhabitants: Lucas, Mia, and Oliver. Lucas states, "If Mia is a knight then Oliver is a knight." Mia claims, "Lucas is a knight." Oliver asserts, "Mia is a knight and Oliver is a knave." So who is a knight and who is a knave?

In a unique land, there are only knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 5 inhabitants: Ethan, Ava, Noah, Emma, and Liam. Ethan says, "If Noah is a knight then Emma is a knight." Ava proclaims, "Ethan is a knave." Noah declares, "Ava is a knight and Liam is a knave." Emma mentions, "Noah is a knave if and only if Liam is a knight." So who is a knight and who is a knave?

In a mysterious village, there are only knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, while knaves always lie. You run into 6 inhabitants: Chloe, Mason, Sophia, Jake, Ruby, and Henry. Chloe states, "If Mason is a knight then Sophia is a knave." Mason claims, "Jake is a knight." Sophia insists, "Chloe is a knight and Ruby is a knave." Henry asserts, "Mason is a knave if and only if Jake is a knight." So who is a knight and who is a knave?

On an isolated island, only knights and knaves populate it. Knights always tell the truth, while knaves always lie. You come across 4 inhabitants: Grace, Liam, Aiden, and Zoey. Grace says, "If Aiden is a knight then Zoey is a knight." Liam states, "Grace is a knave." Aiden notes, "Liam is a knight and Aiden is a knave." Zoey declares, "Liam is a knave if and only if Aiden is a knight." So who is a knight and who is a knave?

In a strange town, only knights and knaves exist. Knights always tell the truth, while knaves always lie. You encounter 3 inhabitants: Sarah, Jack, and Ella. Sarah exclaims, "If Jack is a knight then Ella is a knave." Jack asserts, "Sarah is a knight." Ella mentions, "Jack is a knave and Ella is a knight." So who is a knight and who is a knave?
